steps.title: Attach the relative clause
steps.content: The noun phrase "a scuba diving club" is followed by the relative clause "that is the oldest club for Black divers in the United States." A restrictive relative clause beginning with that attaches directly to the noun it describes.

steps.title: Reject interrupting punctuation
steps.content: Choice B inserts an unnecessary comma between club and that. Choice C inserts an unnecessary dash. Choice D adds a comma and and, breaking the relative-clause structure.

steps.title: Keep noun and clause together
steps.content: No punctuation belongs between club and the restrictive relative clause that identifies what kind of club the Underwater Adventure Seekers is. The answer is A.
